mapper.select: SELECT id, message_type, recipient, subject, content, template_id, template_params, status, send_time, error_message, creator_id, creation_time, last_modifier_id, last_modification_time FROM message_records WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, message_type, recipient, subject, content, template_id, template_params, status, send_time, error_message, creator_id, creation_time, last_modifier_id, last_modification_time FROM message_records WHERE recipient = #{recipient} ORDER BY creation_time DESC

SELECT id, message_type, recipient, subject, content, template_id, template_params, status, send_time, error_message, creator_id, creation_time, last_modifier_id, last_modification_time FROM message_records WHERE message_type = #{messageType} ORDER BY creation_time DESC

SELECT id, message_type, recipient, subject, content, template_id, template_params, status, send_time, error_message, creator_id, creation_time, last_modifier_id, last_modification_time FROM message_records WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY creation_time DESC

SELECT id, message_type, recipient, subject, content, template_id, template_params, status, send_time, error_message, creator_id, creation_time, last_modifier_id, last_modification_time FROM message_records ORDER BY creation_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_records (id, message_type, recipient, subject, content, template_id, template_params, status, send_time, error_message, creator_id, creation_time, last_modifier_id, last_modification_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{messageType}, #{recipient}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{templateId}, #{templateParams}, #{status}, #{sendTime}, #{errorMessage}, #{creatorId}, #{creationTime}, #{lastModifierId}, #{lastModificationTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE message_records SET message_type = #{messageType}, recipient = #{recipient}, subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, template_id = #{templateId}, template_params = #{templateParams}, status = #{status}, send_time = #{sendTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, last_modifier_id = #{lastModifierId}, last_modification_time = #{lastModificationTime} WHERE id = #{id}
